messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: Get out of my face BOY!

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: We don't get many new faces in my tavern… and the last one brought trouble. So speak quick, stranger — are you here for ale, or am I about to throw you back into the mud?

choices.text: Easy, old man… I'm not here for trouble. Just answers. You Garran Whitlock, or am I wasting my time?
Aldric Woodrow sent me. Said I'd find a man with the name Garran Whitlock here.

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: You're either brave or stupid asking that in my tavern. Aye — I'm Garran Whitlock. Now mind your tone before I decide you're wasting mine.

choices.text: Aye, Aldric Woodrow doesn't send people to waste time. I need answers, whether you like it or not.
Easy… I didn't mean any disrespect. Aldric Woodrow sent me — I just need a word with you.

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: Ah, you should've just said that! Might've saved us both a headache… now, spit it out, what can i do you for?

choices.text: Aldric said you'd help us out with some bread?
Word is you can get us some bread. Is that true?

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: Bread, eh? You'll get it… but only if you don't eat it all before you're out the door.

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: Here you go, Come back anytime — a friend of Aldric's is a friend of mine.

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: No worries… you should've just said Aldric sent you. You seem like an honest man — so, what can I do you for?

choices.text: Aldric asked me to fetch some bread, said you'd be the one to help.
Aldric told me you could spare some bread… figured I'd see if that's true.

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: Ah, Aldric, eh? Well, you've come to the right place. Bread you'll have — don't go getting used to my generosity.

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: Heh, trying to test me, are you? Don't worry — Aldric's word is good enough. Bread it is.

messages.speaker: Garran Whitlock
messages.text: Ah, so Aldric sent you… I'm Garran Whitlock. What do you need?

choices.text: Heard from Aldric I could grab some bread here… something about you two having history.
Aldric told me to gather some bread from you. Can you help me out?
